name: troubleshoot-mcp-connection
description: Diagnose and fix MCP server connection issues zwischen Claude Code, Claude Desktop, and MCP servers. Umfasst Windows argument parsing, Authentifizierung failures, transport issues, and platform-specific debugging. Verwenden wenn Claude Code or Claude Desktop fails to connect to an MCP server, when MCP tools don't appear in sessions, on "cannot attach der Server" errors, when a working connection has stopped, or when setting up MCP on a new machine.
